description:
Receive Stripe webhook events through the shared serverless webhook pattern.

**Scope**
- Verify Stripe signatures from the raw request body.
- Record event ID/status in DynamoDB before side effects.
- Process simple mirror updates inline when safe; use SQS/DLQ for retryable downstream actions.
- Handle SetupIntent/payment method, subscription, invoice, refund, dispute, and payment-failure events needed for launch.

**Acceptance**
- Invalid signature produces no state changes.
- Duplicate Stripe event ID is idempotent.
- Stripe CLI test events exercise the full route/Lambda path and update only allowed local fields.
title: Stripe webhook receiver: signature verification + DynamoDB idempotency
